description: An individual step, stage, or phase within a larger process or workflow

name.description: Name or title of the step

step_number.description: Ordinal position of the step within the sequence

description.description: What is accomplished during this step and any notable details

duration_estimate.description: Estimated time to complete the step (e.g., '30 minutes', '2-3 days')

inputs.description: Artifacts, data, or resources required to begin this step

outputs.description: Artifacts, data, or results produced by completing this step

depends_on.description: Names of steps that must be completed before this step can begin
